subject: [PATCH 3/8] mm/memory_hotplug: pass online_type to online_memory_block() via arg

2026-03-21.patch_summary: This patch modifies the `online_memory_block` function to accept the online type as an argument, rather than using a default value. This change prepares for future patches that will allow callers to specify explicit online types. The caller in `add_memory_resource` is updated to pass the default online type via a local variable. No functional changes are made.
